description: After a severe weekend storm, a localized roof leak has drenched a specific section of the warehouse: WH/Stock/Aisle C/Bay 1 and WH/Stock/Aisle C/Bay 2. Log in as admin/admin. Triage the inventory in these two water-damaged locations based on the packaging type found in each product's internal description. Salvage products packaged in 'Plastic Buckets', 'Sealed Plastic Bags', or 'Shrink-wrapped Nylon' by creating an internal transfer to move their exact quantities from Aisle C to the safe location: WH/Stock/Aisle D/Bay 1. Destroy products packaged in 'Cardboard Cartons', 'Paper', or 'Kraft-faced' materials by processing an inventory adjustment or scrap to remove their exact quantities from Aisle C. Do not modify inventory in any other locations, such as Aisle A or Aisle B, even if they contain identical products.

natural_language.prompt:
After a severe weekend storm, a localized roof leak has drenched a specific section of the warehouse: WH/Stock/Aisle C/Bay 1 and WH/Stock/Aisle C/Bay 2. You must triage the inventory currently sitting in these two water-damaged locations. Review each product's internal description to check its packaging type.

1. SALVAGE: Products packaged in 'Plastic Buckets', 'Sealed Plastic Bags', or 'Shrink-wrapped Nylon' survived the water. Create an internal transfer to move their exact quantities from Aisle C to the safe location: WH/Stock/Aisle D/Bay 1.
2. DESTROY: Products packaged in 'Cardboard Cartons', 'Paper', or 'Kraft-faced' materials are ruined. Process an inventory adjustment/scrap to remove their exact quantities from Aisle C (zero them out).

CRITICAL: Do not touch inventory in any other locations (like Aisle A or Aisle B). Some identical products exist in safe aisles; they must not be transferred or scrapped.
